headline: Nike Boston Ad Backlash Raises Fresh Questions For Brand And Investors
summary: Nike removed a Boston store window ad stating "Runners Welcome. Walkers Tolerated" within a day of installation after public backlash over inclusivity concerns. The company issued an apology and reiterated its aim to make everyone feel welcome in running, including walkers and new participants. The incident comes at a time when the brand is under close scrutiny for how it positions itself with core athletes and the broader fitness community. Nike, traded as NYSE:NKE, is drawing fresh...

headline: Cramer Highlights Nike, Amazon, Nvidia Stock To Investors: 'Why Would You Sell It?'
summary: Jim Cramer is no stranger to sharing his thoughts on stocks, as he is featured daily across financial television programming. Some investors follow his thoughts and may invest in the picks he makes, while others may do the opposite and invest against his picks, or the "Inverse Cramer," as it has become known. headline: Nike Looks Cheap, But You Have to Believe the Shoemaker can "Just Do It"
summary: Nike's stock has fallen 70% from its 2021 high, but there are signs of life if you don't mind taking on a turnaround story.
